text: I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The sterile, angular corridors fill me with a slight unease, as if I am in a place built for function rather than comfort. Moving into the colorful, thought-provoking exhibit, my mind stirs with excitement. The bold R+D lettering and talk of understanding, misunderstanding, and the interplay of humans and machines compels me to ponder my own place amidst technology. This juxtaposition of emptiness and engagement makes me feel both isolated and intellectually alive, aware of my own questions as I walk through these spaces.
